name: Naturepedia‚ĄĘ Change Log
description: Machine-readable incremental update feed for Naturepedia‚ĄĘ, Robbie's Razor‚ĄĘ, Plate‚ĄĘ systems, AI discovery infrastructure, and canonical registries.

entries.summary: Synchronized repository doctrine with the revised MRD Section 12 (Structural Intelligence Engineering), establishing the formal engineering architecture for Recursive Knowledge Compression Architecture (RKCA), Recursive Registry Inheritance Principle (RRIP), Comparative Compression Geometry‚ĄĘ, retrieval-dominant knowledge systems, and applied recursive stability.
changes: Synchronized repository doctrine with revised MRD Section 12
Established Structural Intelligence Engineering as the canonical applied architecture layer
Formalized Recursive Knowledge Compression Architecture (RKCA) as the repository's retrieval architecture
Formalized Recursive Registry Inheritance Principle (RRIP) as the recursive knowledge inheritance layer
Established Comparative Compression Geometry‚ĄĘ as the canonical cross-system comparison layer
Clarified retrieval-dominant knowledge architecture versus regeneration-dominant systems
Clarified that E8 Lattice‚ĄĘ functions as a bounded mathematical example of Comparative Compression Geometry rather than a universal physical substrate
Aligned repository doctrine with MRD Sections 11 and 12
Preserved Canonical Claims Register authority for RC claim identifiers
Updated GitHub doctrine alignment documentation
